steps.title: Identify the boundary line
steps.content:
The boundary line crosses the $y$-axis at $6$ and slopes downward steeply. That matches the line
$$y=-4x+6$$

steps.title: Use the shading direction
steps.content: The shaded region is above the boundary line. A point above the line, such as $(0,8)$, satisfies $$8>-4(0)+6$$ So the inequality is $$y>-4x+6$$ The answer is C.
